examples.sentence: Whenever the topic of office politics comes up, Sarah tends to fight shy of joining the conversation.
examples.translation: Whenever the topic of office politics comes up, Sarah tends to avoid joining the conversation.

examples.sentence: I would fight shy of investing in that startup unless I see a more detailed business plan.
examples.translation: I would avoid investing in that startup unless I see a more detailed business plan.

examples.sentence: They fought shy of discussing the budget cuts at the meeting, hoping to postpone the issue.
examples.translation: They avoided discussing the budget cuts at the meeting, hoping to postpone the issue.

examples.sentence: After the interview, Jane carefully filed away all the candidate resumes in the cabinet.
examples.translation: After the interview, Jane carefully placed all the candidate resumes into the filing cabinet.

examples.sentence: The secretary files away all incoming invoices by date to keep the accounts organized.
examples.translation: The secretary places all incoming invoices into files organized by date to keep the accounts organized.

examples.sentence: I have filed away the signed contracts for future reference in the office safe.
examples.translation: I have placed the signed contracts into the filing system for future reference in the office safe.

examples.sentence: Could you file away these reports after you finish reviewing them today, please?
examples.translation: Could you place these reports into the filing system after you finish reviewing them today, please?

examples.sentence: When John told me about the strange encounter, I just filed it away for later consideration.
examples.translation: When John told me about the strange encounter, I stored it in my mind for later consideration.

examples.sentence: She files away every piece of advice her mentor gives her, even if she doesn’t act on it immediately.
examples.translation: She stores every piece of advice her mentor gives her mentally, even if she doesn’t act on it immediately.

examples.sentence: If you don’t have time to respond now, you can just file away my suggestion and get back to me when ready.
examples.translation: If you don’t have time to respond now, you can store my suggestion mentally and get back to me when ready.

examples.sentence: At the end of the ceremony, the students filed away quietly in a single line out of the auditorium.
examples.translation: At the end of the ceremony, the students moved away in an orderly line out of the auditorium.

examples.sentence: The soldiers filed away after the parade, marching in perfect formation toward the barracks.
examples.translation: The soldiers marched off in an orderly line toward the barracks after the parade.

examples.sentence: Please file away through the hall after the presentation so the next group can set up.
examples.translation: Please move away in an orderly line through the hall after the presentation so the next group can set up.

examples.sentence: They were instructed to file away from the courtroom once the judge adjourned the session.
examples.translation: They were instructed to march off in an orderly line from the courtroom once the judge adjourned the session.

examples.sentence: The mechanic filed off the serial numbers from the stolen motorcycles to avoid detection.
examples.translation: The mechanic removed the serial numbers from the stolen motorcycles to avoid detection.

examples.sentence: Before reselling the devices, they had filed off the serial numbers to hide their origin.
examples.translation: Before reselling the devices, they removed the serial numbers to hide their origin.

examples.sentence: He is accused of filing off the serial numbers on the equipment to facilitate illegal sales.
examples.translation: He is accused of removing the serial numbers on the equipment to facilitate illegal sales.

examples.sentence: The police found tools used to file off the serial numbers in the suspect’s workshop.
examples.translation: The police found tools used to remove the serial numbers in the suspect’s workshop.

examples.sentence: The artist was criticized for filing off the serial numbers of the original work when creating his derivative pieces.
examples.translation: The artist was criticized for removing the distinctive elements of the original work when creating his derivative pieces.

examples.sentence: Some writers file off the serial numbers of classic stories to produce new versions without proper credit.
examples.translation: Some writers alter identifying elements of classic stories to produce new versions without proper credit.

examples.sentence: By filing off the serial numbers of the musical composition, the band tried to pass it off as their own creation.
examples.translation: By stripping the identifying parts of the musical composition, the band tried to present it as their own creation.

examples.sentence: We need to fill in the large holes in the garden before planting the new flowers.
examples.translation: We need to put material into the large holes in the garden before planting the new flowers.

examples.sentence: The workers filled in the cracks on the pavement to make it safe for pedestrians.
examples.translation: The workers put material into the cracks on the pavement to make it safe for pedestrians.

examples.sentence: After the storm, they filled in the gaps in the fence to prevent animals from escaping.
examples.translation: After the storm, they put material into the gaps in the fence to prevent animals from escaping.

examples.sentence: Can you fill in this pothole on the road with gravel before the rain starts?
examples.translation: Can you put gravel into this pothole on the road before the rain starts?

examples.sentence: Could you fill me in on what happened during the meeting I missed yesterday?
examples.translation: Could you inform me about what happened during the meeting I missed yesterday?

examples.sentence: I wasn’t at the conference, so I asked my colleague to fill me in on the main points.
examples.translation: I wasn’t at the conference, so I asked my colleague to inform me about the main points.

examples.sentence: When you get a chance, please fill me in about the new project deadlines.
examples.translation: When you get a chance, please inform me about the new project deadlines.

examples.sentence: Jane agreed to fill in for Tom while he was on vacation last week.
examples.translation: Jane agreed to act as a substitute for Tom while he was on vacation last week.

examples.sentence: If Mark can't make it to the meeting, can you fill in for him?
examples.translation: If Mark can't attend the meeting, can you act as a substitute for him?

examples.sentence: The teacher filled in for the regular instructor who was out sick yesterday.
examples.translation: The teacher substituted for the regular instructor who was out sick yesterday.

examples.sentence: Please fill in the application form carefully before submitting it to the office.
examples.translation: Please complete the application form by supplying the requested information before submitting it to the office.

examples.sentence: I forgot to fill in the blank spaces on the questionnaire, so I had to redo it.
examples.translation: I forgot to complete the empty spaces on the questionnaire, so I had to redo it.

examples.sentence: Could you fill in your details on this form so we can process your registration?
examples.translation: Could you complete your details on this form so we can process your registration?

examples.sentence: They asked us to fill in the survey online by the end of the week.
examples.translation: They asked us to complete the survey online by the end of the week.

examples.sentence: After the argument, Mike threatened to fill in anyone who crossed him again.
examples.translation: After the argument, Mike threatened to physically assault anyone who crossed him again.

examples.sentence: If someone bullies you at school, don’t hesitate to tell an adult before you get filled in.
examples.translation: If someone bullies you at school, don’t hesitate to tell an adult before you get beaten up.

examples.sentence: The gang members filled in their rival after the fight broke out downtown last night.
examples.translation: The gang members physically assaulted their rival after the fight broke out downtown last night.

examples.sentence: During the English class, the teacher gave us a fill in the blank exercise to test our vocabulary.
examples.translation: During the English class, the teacher gave us an exercise where words were omitted and we had to supply the correct words to test our vocabulary.

examples.sentence: I found the fill in the blank section of the test quite challenging because some clues were ambiguous.
examples.translation: I found the exercise where I had to supply missing words in the test quite challenging because some clues were ambiguous.

examples.sentence: Please complete the fill in the blank worksheet by writing the missing words in the sentences.
examples.translation: Please complete the worksheet by writing the missing words in the sentences.

examples.sentence: The fill in the blank format is often used in language learning to improve grammar skills.
examples.translation: The exercise format where blanks must be filled is often used in language learning to improve grammar skills.

examples.sentence: When asked about his favorite hobby, he just said 'fill in the blank' as if to leave it open-ended.
examples.translation: When asked about his favorite hobby, he used 'fill in the blank' to suggest any answer could fit.

examples.sentence: The questionnaire had a section labeled 'fill in the blank' where respondents could write any description they preferred.
examples.translation: The questionnaire had a section inviting respondents to write any description they preferred.

examples.sentence: She used 'fill in the blank' in her speech to encourage the audience to imagine their own possibilities.
examples.translation: She used the phrase to invite the audience to imagine their own answers.

examples.sentence: At the family gathering, Grandpa filled his boots with all the homemade pies he could eat.
examples.translation: At the family gathering, Grandpa ate heartily all the homemade pies he could.

examples.sentence: The campers filled their boots after a long day of hiking with the hearty stew prepared by the guide.
examples.translation: The campers ate greedily after a long day of hiking with the hearty stew prepared by the guide.

examples.sentence: Make sure to fill your boots at the buffet tonight; there will be plenty of food for everyone.
examples.translation: Make sure to eat heartily at the buffet tonight; there will be plenty of food for everyone.

examples.sentence: She filled her boots on the delicious Thanksgiving feast, enjoying every bite.
examples.translation: She ate greedily of the delicious Thanksgiving feast, enjoying every bite.

examples.sentence: When the company announced bonuses, the sales team really filled their boots with enthusiasm and extra effort.
examples.translation: When the company announced bonuses, the sales team took full advantage by working energetically and to the fullest extent.

examples.sentence: You should fill your boots while the conference offers so many networking opportunities.
examples.translation: You should take full advantage of the conference’s networking opportunities.

examples.sentence: They filled their boots with the chance to travel abroad as part of the new project.
examples.translation: They indulged themselves freely in the opportunity to travel abroad as part of the new project.

examples.sentence: After the soccer game, the kids filled their faces with ice cream and snacks.
examples.translation: After the soccer game, the kids ate eagerly ice cream and snacks.

examples.sentence: He filled his face quickly during the lunch break because he was starving.
examples.translation: He ate greedily during the lunch break because he was starving.

examples.sentence: At the festival, people were filling their faces with all kinds of street food.
examples.translation: At the festival, people were eagerly eating all kinds of street food.

examples.sentence: Don’t fill your face too fast or you might get a stomach ache later.
examples.translation: Don’t eat too eagerly or you might get a stomach ache later.

examples.sentence: She filled her hand with a bunch of papers before heading into the meeting room.
examples.translation: She grasped a bunch of papers in her hand before heading into the meeting room.

examples.sentence: The cashier filled his hands with the shopping bags and struggled to open the door.
examples.translation: The cashier grasped the shopping bags in his hands and struggled to open the door.

examples.sentence: I filled my hand with tools and walked over to fix the broken chair.
examples.translation: I grasped tools in my hand and walked over to fix the broken chair.

examples.sentence: He filled both of his hands with groceries and tried not to drop anything on the way home.
examples.translation: He grasped groceries in both hands and tried not to drop anything on the way home.

examples.sentence: Before the confrontation, the detective filled his hand with his service pistol just in case things got dangerous.
examples.translation: Before the confrontation, the detective drew his handgun in preparation for danger.

examples.sentence: If you suspect trouble, it’s best to fill your hand and be ready to defend yourself.
examples.translation: If you suspect trouble, it’s best to arm yourself with a handgun and be ready to defend yourself.

examples.sentence: He was seen filling his hand with a weapon before entering the abandoned building.
examples.translation: He was seen drawing a handgun before entering the abandoned building.

examples.sentence: John’s new shoes were a bit tight, so it took a while for him to get used to filling someone else’s shoes comfortably.
examples.translation: John’s new shoes were a bit tight, so it took a while for him to wear someone else’s shoes comfortably.

examples.sentence: After the dance performance, the students lined up to fill their shoes and prepare for the next act.
examples.translation: After the dance performance, the students lined up to physically wear their shoes and prepare for the next act.

examples.sentence: She carefully filled her shoes before stepping onto the stage for the ceremony.
examples.translation: She carefully put on her shoes before stepping onto the stage for the ceremony.

examples.sentence: The child struggled to fill the oversized shoes his father had left behind.
examples.translation: The child struggled to wear the oversized shoes his father had left behind.

examples.sentence: After the manager resigned, Lisa was asked to fill his shoes until a replacement was found.
examples.translation: After the manager resigned, Lisa was asked to perform his job duties until a replacement was found.

examples.sentence: It’s not easy to fill someone else’s shoes, especially when they were so successful in the role.
examples.translation: It’s not easy to assume someone else’s job responsibilities, especially when they were so successful.

examples.sentence: Mark had to fill his mentor’s shoes quickly after the unexpected departure last month.
examples.translation: Mark had to take over his mentor’s role quickly after the unexpected departure last month.

examples.sentence: She filled the bill by providing the exact specifications required for the contract.
examples.translation: She completed the requirements by providing the exact specifications required for the contract.

examples.sentence: The contractor promised to fill the bill by finishing all the necessary work on time.
examples.translation: The contractor promised to complete all the necessary work on time.

examples.sentence: I have filled the bill with all the requested documents for your review.
examples.translation: I have supplied all the requested documents for your review.

examples.sentence: After the audit, they confirmed that all items filled the bill according to the checklist.
examples.translation: After the audit, they confirmed that all items met the requirements according to the checklist.

examples.sentence: This candidate really fills the bill for the position with her experience and skills.
examples.translation: This candidate is suitable for the position because of her experience and skills.

examples.sentence: If you want a car that’s reliable and affordable, this model fills the bill perfectly.
examples.translation: This model is suitable and satisfactory as a reliable and affordable car.

examples.sentence: Their proposal fills the bill for what the committee was looking for in a new policy.
examples.translation: Their proposal meets the requirements and expectations of the committee for a new policy.

examples.sentence: We need to fill up the water tanks before the drought worsens.
examples.translation: We need to make the water tanks completely full before the drought worsens.

examples.sentence: The workers filled up the foundation with gravel to prepare for the concrete pouring.
examples.translation: The workers added gravel to make the foundation completely full in preparation for concrete pouring.

examples.sentence: Please fill up the boxes with all the books before shipping them out.
examples.translation: Please put books into the boxes until they are completely full before shipping them out.

examples.sentence: She filled up the vase with fresh flowers from the garden.
examples.translation: She placed fresh flowers into the vase until it was full.

examples.sentence: The stadium filled up quickly as fans arrived for the big game.
examples.translation: The stadium became completely full as fans arrived for the big game.

examples.sentence: Once the parking lot filled up, the attendants had to redirect new arrivals to another location.
examples.translation: Once the parking lot reached capacity, the attendants redirected new arrivals to another location.

examples.sentence: The theater filled up an hour before the show started.
examples.translation: The theater became completely full an hour before the show started.

examples.sentence: The elevator filled up quickly during the morning rush hour.
examples.translation: The elevator became completely full quickly during the morning rush hour.

examples.sentence: I stopped at the gas station to fill up my car before the long trip.
examples.translation: I stopped at the gas station to refuel my car before the long trip.

examples.sentence: They always fill up their tanks on the highway to avoid running out of fuel in remote areas.
examples.translation: They always refuel their tanks on the highway to avoid running out of fuel in remote areas.

examples.sentence: Can you fill up the motorbike before we head out for the countryside ride?
examples.translation: Can you refuel the motorbike before we head out for the countryside ride?

examples.sentence: After the hike, we stopped at a diner to fill up since we were all very hungry.
examples.translation: After the hike, we stopped at a diner to eat enough food to satisfy our hunger.

examples.sentence: The restaurant’s portion sizes are generous enough to fill you up after a meal.
examples.translation: The restaurant’s portion sizes provide enough food to satisfy your hunger after a meal.

examples.sentence: Make sure to fill up before the event; there won’t be many food options available later.
examples.translation: Make sure to eat enough before the event; there won’t be many food options available later.

examples.sentence: When she heard the bad news, her eyes quickly filled up with tears of sadness.
examples.translation: When she heard the bad news, her eyes became tearful due to strong sadness.

examples.sentence: His voice filled up with emotion as he spoke about his childhood memories.
examples.translation: His voice became emotionally full as he spoke about his childhood memories.

examples.sentence: I could see her chest filling up with pride when the award was announced.
examples.translation: I could see her becoming emotionally full of pride when the award was announced.

examples.sentence: He keeps filling me up with questions every time I try to concentrate on my work.
examples.translation: He keeps irritating me by asking questions every time I try to concentrate on my work.

examples.sentence: The kids filled up their older sister by teasing her relentlessly during the road trip.
examples.translation: The kids annoyed their older sister by teasing her relentlessly during the road trip.

examples.sentence: I’m starting to get filled up with all this nagging about my chores.
examples.translation: I’m starting to get irritated by all this nagging about my chores.

examples.sentence: On the river, she managed to fill up her hand with a perfect full house and won the pot.
examples.translation: On the river card, she completed a full house hand and won the pot.

examples.sentence: He was just one card away but filled up on the turn to secure the winning hand.
examples.translation: He completed his full house hand on the turn card to secure the win.

examples.sentence: Watching him fill up during the final round showed his expert poker skills.
examples.translation: Watching him complete a full house hand during the final round showed his expert poker skills.

examples.sentence: Before submitting your tax return, make sure to fill up all the required fields correctly.
examples.translation: Before submitting your tax return, make sure to complete all the required fields correctly.

examples.sentence: The online form must be filled up with accurate information to avoid delays in processing.
examples.translation: The online form must be completed with accurate information to avoid delays in processing.

examples.sentence: Can you fill up this registration form while I handle the payments?
examples.translation: Can you complete this registration form while I handle the payments?
